no-restricted-syntax.message: Read-only chokepoint (ARCHITECTURE.md): member-call write-capable fs calls (fs.writeFileSync(...)) are banned outside the sanctioned settings-IO module (src/settings/claudeSettingsIO.ts). Nothing may ever write under ~/.claude/projects/. If you genuinely need to write Claude's settings.json, do it there behind the path-asserting chokepoint; otherwise this is a read-only surface.

Read-only chokepoint (ARCHITECTURE.md): computed-access write-capable fs calls (fs['writeFileSync'](...)) are banned outside the sanctioned settings-IO module (src/settings/claudeSettingsIO.ts). Nothing may ever write under ~/.claude/projects/.

Read-only chokepoint (ARCHITECTURE.md): destructured/named import of a write-capable fs member (import { writeFileSync } from 'fs') is banned outside the sanctioned settings-IO module (src/settings/claudeSettingsIO.ts). This is the entry point for a bare or aliased write; import write-capable fs members only in the chokepoint.
Read-only chokepoint (ARCHITECTURE.md): aliasing a write-capable fs member (const w = fs.writeFileSync) is banned outside the sanctioned settings-IO module (src/settings/claudeSettingsIO.ts).

Read-only chokepoint (ARCHITECTURE.md): destructuring a write-capable fs member out of require('fs') or require('fs/promises'), sync or async, is banned outside the sanctioned settings-IO module (src/settings/claudeSettingsIO.ts).

Read-only chokepoint (ARCHITECTURE.md): bare write-capable fs call from a destructured/aliased import (writeFileSync(...)) is banned outside the sanctioned settings-IO module (src/settings/claudeSettingsIO.ts). Nothing may ever write under ~/.claude/projects/.
